docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,381.00 FILED BY O KEEFFE CONSTRUCTION COMPANY INC AS TO DEFENDANT BAY DOOR INC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-03-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 03
